ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service or resource */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host providing the service */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the service */,
  "expire_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of expiration policy for the service */,
  "expire_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for expiration time */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application using the service */,
  "is_in_browser_element" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the service is used within a browser element (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  "revoked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if access to the service has been revoked (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when access to the service was revoked */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Current status of the service (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_expire_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("expire_type_id") REFERENCES expiration_types ("expire_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name or domain of the host */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the host */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the host was last updated */,
  "host_status" TEXT /* Current status of the host (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expiration_types" (
  "expire_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration type */,
  "expire_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expiration type (e.g., never, time-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expiration type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expiration type was last updated */,
  "expire_type_status" TEXT /* Current status of the expiration type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  "app_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being accessed */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application making the access request */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access request was made */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access request (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "access_message" TEXT /* Message describing the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned a permission */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
